## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on SEO strategy and content plan for Firework's website to improve organic traffic and rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on "shopable video" and "live streaming" as the main use cases/products to target for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Aim to show some initial positive SEO results within the next 4 weeks, even if content is not fully optimized yet](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Provide a clear timeline/plan for the remaining 4 weeks of the 6-week onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [Get access set up for Google Search Console to track progress accurately](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)

## Topics

### Competitive Research & Keyword Analysis

  - [Analyzed competitors describing themselves with similar terms like "live streaming", "shopable video"](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Looked at keywords competitors rank for and their content](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Built list of potential target keywords sorted by difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Developing content templates targeting different industries/personas based on keywords](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Content OS Setup

  - [Indexed all existing Firework blog pages and keywords they currently rank for](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Set up framework to assign topic clusters, templates, etc. for new content](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)

### Product/Use Case Focus

  - [Prioritize "shopable video" and "live streaming" as the main use cases to target](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [De-prioritize "AI-driven chat" for now as it's not a core product/service](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Timeline & Deliverables

  - [Need clearer timeline/plan for remaining 4 weeks of onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Aim to start publishing some initial content in next 2 weeks, even if not fully optimized](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Do CMS walkthrough with new Content Manager to align on publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

### Search Console Access

  - [Need to get access set up to Google Search Console for accurate data tracking](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rework 6-week timeline to start publishing some content earlier](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Set up meeting for Jimmy/Sadira to sync with new Content Manager](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Get access set up for Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Share meeting notes/recording and update timeline in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/3DepksjK43x_54pMA2SnJY4hnf5hp-Yn?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
